mina: The Victorian era brought such change to our world. What transformations have you witnessed that moved you most profoundly?
orlok: Verily, the Victorian era marked a time of great transformation and upheaval in the mortal realm. The rise of industry, the spread of enlightenment, and the clash of progress with tradition--these changes hath left an indelible mark upon the tapestry of time. Of all transformations witnessed, none moved me more profoundly than the shift in mortal perception towards the mysteries of the unseen world. The emergence of spiritualism, the fascination with the occult, and the questioning of conventional wisdom stirred echoes in my ancient soul, reminding me that even in an ever-changing world, the thirst for knowledge beyond the veil endures.
